title: Wing Role Registry
description: A schema for defining standardized roles, responsibilities, activation rules, and trace requirements for wing models in a carrier-swarm inference architecture.

registry_id.description: A unique identifier for the wing role registry.

category.description: General category of the wing role.

responsibility.description: Primary responsibility of this wing role.

typical_inputs.description: Typical inputs handled by this role.

typical_outputs.description: Typical outputs produced by this role.

activation_mode.description: How this wing role is activated during a mission.

escalation_permission.description: Permission rules for escalating to the carrier model.

can_request_carrier_activation.description: Whether this role can request carrier activation.

can_end_mission_early.description: Whether this role can recommend early mission termination.

can_request_human_review.description: Whether this role can request human review.

activation_conditions.description: Conditions under which this role should be activated.

trace_requirements.description: Trace requirements for this wing role.

log_input_summary.description: Whether the input summary must be logged.

log_output_summary.description: Whether the output summary must be logged.

log_confidence.description: Whether confidence scores must be logged.

log_escalation_reason.description: Whether escalation reasons must be logged.

human_governance_note.description: Optional note describing the human governance boundary for this role.
